text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Come now, you mustn't dwell on it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's adorable seeing all of these little plushies and
the way each one sits so distinctively in place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I've had ever so much fun. ♪
